allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\node.exe"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
